tools.name: dalle
tools.description: DALL-E image generation tool. Creates images from text descriptions.

prompts.description: Array of detailed image generation prompts (~100 words each, in English)

seeds.description: Array of seed values for reproducible image generation

tools.name: python
tools.description: Execute Python code in a stateful Jupyter notebook environment. Can save files to /mnt/data. No internet access.

tools.name: browser
tools.description: Web browsing tool for searching and retrieving web content.

functions.name: search
functions.description: Search the web for a query

recency_days.description: Optional: limit results to the past N days

functions.name: mclick
functions.description: Retrieve content from multiple URLs in parallel

ids.description: Array of result IDs to retrieve

functions.name: open_url
functions.description: Open a specific URL and retrieve its content

tools.name: bio
tools.description: Memory/personalization tool for remembering user preferences and information across conversations.

content.description: Information to remember about the user

tools.name: canmore.textdoc
tools.description: Canvas tool for creating and editing text documents and code alongside the chat.

functions.name: createTextDocument
functions.description: Create a new text document in the canvas

functions.name: updateTextDocument
functions.description: Update an existing text document in the canvas

updates.description: Array of update operations to apply
